w:r.w:t: 18 SQL Tables | 35 React Pages | 60+ API Endpoints | 4 User Roles | 2 App Modules
All menus, reports, user management, system config
Own institute, courses, student interests, commissions
0. User Roles & Menu / Feature Access Matrix
4 Roles: Admin · Accounting · Consultant · User (Vendor). ✓ = Full P = Partial — = No Access
Changes: Colleges table removed (Institutes = Colleges). VendorAgreements split to separate table. Added Employees, Tasks, EnrolmentStatuses.
Tracks internal staff / consultants for work history and hours reports.
Separated from Vendors table — agreement docs are personal & access-controlled.
Institutes ARE colleges. No separate Colleges table needed. Institute detail page serves as the public-facing vendor/student search page.
Students are registered after showing AIH (interest) form. Enrolment status tracked separately.
Guest / public user submits AIH form without login. Admin can convert to a Student record + CRM Lead.
Two sub-tables: CommissionRates (config per vendor/institute/course) and CommissionEarnings (actual earned amounts).
Vendor Portal public search and Student public search are MERGED into one unified portal. Login optional — guests browse freely; login via Vendor Code or Phone OTP.
Public / Unified Vendor + Student Portal (No Mandatory Login)
Single portal serves both vendors and students. Guest users can browse and submit AIH form. Login via Vendor Code or Phone OTP unlocks vendor dashboard.
Login — Vendor Code or Phone OTP
Employee Working Hours report is embedded in the Employees Work History page (#31). PDF & Excel export available on all report pages.
POST /api/auth/vendor-login → Login via vendor code or phone OTP
POST /api/auth/send-otp → Send OTP SMS to phone
GET /api/tasks → Filter by assignee / status / entity
GET /api/institutes → Public search with filters (name, city, service)
PUT /api/courses/:id/approve → Admin approval of AI-fetched data
GET /api/students → List with enrolment status filter
POST /api/aih → Public AIH form submission (no auth)
PUT /api/aih/:id/convert → Convert to Student + CRM Lead
GET /api/reports/export/pdf → Export any report as PDF
GET /api/reports/export/excel → Export any report as Excel
│ ├── Middleware/ ← JWT Auth, Role guard, Error handler
Extract course data from institute websites
Scrapes institute website for courses, fees, eligibility. Stores results in Courses table with IsAIFetched=1. Queues admin review.
Evaluates ReminderRules against PaymentSchedules and InstituteExcelUploads. Fires emails via SendGrid when conditions met.
Pre-calculates anticipated commission amounts for the next 3 months, caches for dashboard widget.
Checks VendorAgreements.ExpiryDate. Sends renewal reminder 30, 15, and 7 days before expiry.
DB schema (18 tables), EF Core migrations, Auth API (JWT + OTP), Role guards
User management, Role assignment, Employee records, Work history logging
Vendor registration, Admin approval, VendorCode gen, Agreement upload (secured)
Institute CRUD, Status management, Public search API, Institute detail page (React)
Course management, AI scraping job, Admin approval of scraped data, Hangfire setup
Unified public portal (React), AIH form, Guest interest capture, Enrolment statuses
Commission rate config (vendor+institute level), earnings calc, approval, PDF statements
Payment schedules, Excel upload & reconciliation, Invoice generation & approval workflow
Reminder rules engine, Email templates, Hangfire scheduling, reminder logs
4 dashboards, 5 reports, PDF/Excel export, Audit logs, Tasks, performance tuning
